title: Aureline telemetry, support-export, and usage-export stable schema registry
description: Schema for the telemetry_support_usage_schema_registry artifact. Extends the governed schema registry with endpoint-policy truth per deployment context, redaction profile references, deprecated-field handling policy, partial-outcome markers, offboarding compatibility notes, and OSS telemetry exception packet provenance. Each row cross-references an existing entry in schemas/registry/schema_registry.json via entry_id and adds the M4 governance dimensions that were not present in the base registry. A row may not claim stable promotion until all required governance dimensions are present and validated.

path_ref.description: Repo-relative path. Consumers treat it as opaque text.

entry_id.description: Stable dot-separated id matching an entry in schemas/registry/schema_registry.json.

context_class.description: Deployment context that determines which endpoint policy applies.

endpoint_policy_truth.description: Operative endpoint policy for a specific deployment context. local_only means data never leaves the device. queued_for_manual_export means data is held locally and only leaves on explicit user or admin action. managed_endpoint means the data flows to a vendor-operated managed plane. disabled_by_policy_or_flavor means the family is not active on this lane.

deprecated_field_handling.description: Policy for what readers do when they encounter a deprecated or unknown field version. preserve_as_unknown is the safe default for most families. refuse_read applies to authoritative managed packets where schema drift is a data-integrity risk.

partial_outcome_marker.description: Whether packets in this family can be partial. none means the packet is always complete. partial_suppressed_by_policy means fields may be omitted under redaction or admin policy suppression. partial_offboarding_window_bounded means completeness depends on an offboarding availability window. requires_manual_reconciliation means partial packets need human review to resolve.

note.description: Reviewable sentence explaining why this policy truth applies for the context.

entry_id.description: Stable id matching the corresponding entry in schemas/registry/schema_registry.json.

family_class.description: Payload family class. Must match the family_class field of the corresponding entry in schemas/registry/schema_registry.json.

lifecycle_state.description: Governed lifecycle state. Stable promotion requires active with all required governance dimensions present.

redaction_profile_ref.description: Repo-relative reference to the redaction profile or ADR that governs what bytes this family excludes when crossing a boundary.

open_source_default_posture.description: Default posture for OSS and local builds. Telemetry families must stay opt_in_disabled_until_user_consent unless a signed exception packet overrides it.

oss_telemetry_exception_packet_ref.description: Signed exception packet reference that authorizes a narrower OSS posture than opt_in_disabled_until_user_consent. Null when the default posture applies. May not be a free-form string; it must resolve to an exception packet artifact.

schema_diff_report_ref.description: Reference to the schema diff report artifact produced when this family's schema version advanced from a prior stable version. Null only for initial-version registrations. Required before stable promotion whenever schema_version increases.

endpoint_policy_truth_by_context.description: Per-deployment-context endpoint policy truth. Must include entries for oss_local, self_hosted, and managed_enterprise.

offboarding_compatibility_note.description: Reviewable sentence stating how this family behaves when the managed entitlement ends or the user initiates account exit. Required for all rows before stable promotion.

total_rows.description: Total number of rows in this registry.

labeled_rows.description: Rows that carry all required governance dimensions. Must equal total_rows for stable promotion.

telemetry_rows_with_oss_opt_in_default.description: Telemetry-family rows whose open_source_default_posture is opt_in_disabled_until_user_consent.

local_only_oss_context_rows.description: Rows whose endpoint_policy_truth in the oss_local context is local_only.

managed_endpoint_rows.description: Rows whose endpoint_policy_truth in the managed_enterprise context is managed_endpoint.

queued_manual_export_rows.description: Rows that require explicit user or admin action to emit (queued_for_manual_export in any context).

governed_schema_registry_ref.description: Path to schemas/registry/schema_registry.json. Rows in this registry must match entry_ids found there.

consent_ledger_ref.description: Path to artifacts/governance/consent_ledger_seed.yaml. Families in this registry correspond to seed rows there.

context_classes.description: Closed set of deployment context classes.

endpoint_policy_truth_classes.description: Closed set of endpoint policy truth values.

deprecated_field_handling_classes.description: Closed set of deprecated-field handling policies.
